title: FareBreakup
description: A detailed breakdown of the total fare into its constituent components, including base fare, taxes, surcharges, and discounts.

componentTitle.description: Human-readable title for this fare component

amount.description: Monetary amount for this fare component

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for this component

taxAmount.description: Tax amount included in this component

title.description: Title or label of this price component

tags.description: Tags associated with this price component
